Instantly distinguish your tabs with custom names and emoji favicons that stick.

Instantly distinguish your tabs with custom names and emojis that stick.

Sometimes when I'm working I have 8 similar tabs and I can't remember what's what.
This extension helps me wrangle the chaos. If you have vertical tabs, this extension works a treat. Until renaming tabs is a native feature, I give you this.

Features

- Rename any tab instantly — your custom name sticks no matter what the page does
- Set emoji — pick any emoji to replace the boring default favicon
- Persists across reloads and restarts — your names and emojis survive page refreshes, browser restarts, and back/forward navigation
- Quick access — press Alt+R or right-click any page to rename
- Privacy-first — all data stays local in your browser
- Open source - because why wouldn't you make a simple app like this open source, and free.

Helps to clean up your YouTube from content in russian language

This extension is written for Ukrainians who are tired of seeing content in the Russian language on their Youtube. Even if your Google account language is Ukrainian (or English), and your OS language is not Russian but your location is Ukraine, Youtube will continue to show you videos in Russian. 

This extension helps you with this issue. It may hide (blur) all videos with title or the channel name in the russian language. Also, optionally, it may click "Not interested" on such videos. So, next time you will see less such videos.

Hides Russian content on YouTube, and helps not to recommend it if it finds Russian letters (ы, ъ, е...) or specifically Russian words in the video title. In order for Russian videos to be blocked, you need to log in to your YouTube account (otherwise they will be just blurred).

► Currently works on:
    ✓ Home page
    ✓ Sidebar recommendations (when watching video).

► Has different ways to block russian videos:
  ✓ Just blur (intensity is configurable)
  ✓ Click "Not interested" and blur
  ✓ Click "Not recommend this channel"

► Has local stats about analyzed videos

► Has dark and light theme

☀️ Tips:
    ● Popup has short stats, with list of russian videos blocked during last hour, there are also "Detailed stats" button, which opens stats page that has search, filters etc.
    ● In some places (especially on detailed stats page), hover to get help.
    ● On detailed stats page, there is "Count word stats" button, that logs words and how many times they are found in selection to console (press F12).

If you find some problems, i would appreciate any reviews. YouTube sometimes changes it's layout, so, unfortunately, problems may occur.

It is open source project, you can take a look at code or contrubute to it here:
https://github.com/ronikiienko/piggy-blocker

Amazonのセール品や割引商品といったお買い得商品のみを表示するフィルター機能を提供します．

Amazonの検索ページにおいて，セール，割引，クーポン等のお買い得商品のみを表示する機能を提供します．

Amazonの検索バーの右にフィルター切替ボタンがでるので，そのボタンを押すか，Ctrl+Shift+Sキーを押すことで表示の切り替えが行なえます．ショートカットキーは chrome://extensions/shortcuts よりお好みの設定をしてください．

フィルター時に残す商品タイプはオプションから設定することができます．本拡張のアイコンをクリックし，オプションを選択してください．このオプション画面はインストール時にも自動で開くようになっています．

また，開発費用の援助のためにAmazonのリンクに私のアソシエイトタグを埋め込む機能があります．機能に差はでませんので，もしご援助頂ける方はこれをONにしてご利用してください．

GeneralWeb: AI Website Translator & Instant Page Translate
Your web, your language! Instantly translate any site with one click.

🌐 GeneralWeb

🚨 Please Read Before You Begin  
➖ This extension is free to install, but requires an API key from an external AI service for translation.  
➖ You must obtain and set up your own API key.  
➖ Using these APIs usually involves a cost, although Google Gemini offers a free trial.

💡 What is GeneralWeb?  
GeneralWeb is an innovative Chrome extension that instantly translates any web page into your native language.  
It completely removes language barriers and provides a true global web experience where all online content becomes accessible.


✨ Features  
✅ One-Click Translation  
Translate any page instantly using the side panel or mini panel. No page reloads or navigation required.

✅ Choose Your AI Provider  
➖ OpenAI GPT-4  
➖ Google Gemini (Gemini / Gemini Nano)  
➖ Claude (Anthropic)  
➖ DeepSeek  
Access world-class translation performance with fair and transparent pricing.

✅ Prompt Customization  
Freely control the tone and style of translations. Whether polite, casual, expressive, or formal — give your translation a personal touch.

✅ Popup Translation  
Translate only the selected text instantly, without affecting the entire page.

✅ Input Assist  
Displays a translation UI above text input fields, allowing you to instantly translate your input using any language and custom prompt.

✅ Focused Translation  
Displays a translation button below posts on 𝕏 and GitHub Issues/PRs, allowing you to translate just that specific item with a single click.

✅ Keyboard Shortcuts  
Translate instantly using only the keyboard — stay in your workflow without interruption.

✅ Glossary Support  
Define and fix translations for technical or academic terms in advance.

✅ Supports 150+ Languages  
Wide coverage from major global languages to lesser-known ones.

✅ Exclude Blocks from Translation  
Use CSS selectors to exclude specific parts of the page from translation.

✅ Professional-Grade Quality  
Delivers natural, accurate translations far beyond traditional machine translation by fully understanding context.

✅ [Advanced] On-Device Translation with Gemini Nano  
If you're using Chrome v138 (Beta), you can use Gemini Nano for free on your device.  
※ The current stable version is v137. To use this feature, you’ll need to install the Beta version.  
※ This is an optional feature; API-based translation is more accurate overall.

📌 Use Cases by User Type  
👨‍💼 Business Professionals: "Read international news and documents in higher quality than browser or Google Translate."  
"Add a prompt like 'include annotations for terms unfamiliar in my native language' to receive annotated translations."

🎓 Students: "Translate foreign articles while keeping technical terms intact."  
"Translate historical documents in the voice of speakers from that era."

👩‍🍳 Home Cooks: "Read Greek recipe websites in your native language and cook instantly."

🧑‍💻 Developers: "Understand technical blogs in other languages — even code comments are translated accurately."

📎 Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)  
Q. What is an API key?  
A. It’s a unique key provided by translation providers (like OpenAI or Google) that allows you to access their APIs.

Q. Is it free?  
A. The extension itself is free. However, translation uses paid APIs, depending on the provider. (Google Gemini offers a free tier.)

🔒 Privacy & Security  
Your API keys and translated content are never sent anywhere except to your chosen provider.

🌟 The Innovation of GeneralWeb  
Traditional translation extensions rely on a single engine.  
GeneralWeb is the world’s first purpose-optimized web translation extension — allowing you to freely choose from multiple cutting-edge AIs and optimize translation quality by use case through prompt engineering.

AI adapts to your reading style to deliver the most suitable translation.  
The world’s knowledge is waiting — in your native language.

Auto refresh for websites with multiple timers and advances settings

Page Auto Refresh🔄 - Introducing Auto Refresh Website - Reload Page 🔄 
Say hello to auto refresh tabs chrome - Chrome Extensions Auto Refresh and...
Say goodbye to the tedium of manually refreshing tabs on Chrome.

What this Auto refresh website chrome extension do in short 🌟 Features:

1️⃣ Background-friendly: Works even if you minimize Chrome or switch to other tabs. 
2️⃣ Tab Control: Easily pause or resume refreshing for each tab. 
3️⃣ Stop Refresh on website: Click anywhere on website to pause refreshing when needed. 
4️⃣ Countdown Timer: Get a heads-up with a countdown before the next refresh. ⏳
5️⃣ Custom Refresh Cycles: Set the number of refreshes before a pause. 🔄🛑



Why choose Auto Refresh Website - Reload Page?

1. Background-friendly: No need to keep Chrome open or stay on the active tab. The extension works seamlessly in the background, even when you minimize Chrome or switch to other tabs. Enjoy uninterrupted browsing while it does its thing.

2. Tab Control: Take charge of your browsing sessions like never before. Easily pause or resume refreshing for each tab individually. Manage your tasks efficiently without the hassle of juggling multiple tabs.

3. Tailored Refresh Intervals: Customize the refresh intervals to suit your needs. Choose from various timeframes like 5 seconds, 15 seconds, 1 minute, or 5 minutes or 3h 13min 21s...

4. Stop Refresh by Clicking Anywhere on the Website: When you encounter captivating content that demands your full attention, you can easily halt the refreshing process by simply clicking anywhere on the website. Say goodbye to accidental page reloads and enjoy uninterrupted browsing with the flexibility to stop refreshing whenever you need.

5. Stay Informed with Countdown Timer: Stay ahead with the built-in Countdown Timer. Keep track of the time remaining until the next refresh. Stay organized and in control of your browsing experience.

6. Customized Refresh Cycles: Tailor the refresh cycles to your exact preferences. Set the desired number of refreshes before taking a break or establish a recurring pattern. Whether it's 100 refreshes every 5 seconds or any other configuration, the extension automatically pauses when the target is reached. Effortlessly manage your tabs according to your workflow.

Experience the ultimate efficiency in tab management with Auto Refresh Website - Reload Page. Say goodbye to manual tab refreshing and embrace the convenience of automated browsing with a single click. Try it today and revolutionize your online activities!

Auto Refresh Website - Reload Page, tab management, background-friendly, customized intervals, stop refresh, countdown timer, effortless browsing.

NutriData - Product Nutrition Analyzer for REWE, Amazon & Mercadona
Analyzes nutrition information for products on supported online shops. (REWE, Amazon & Mercadona)

NutriData enhances online shopping experiences by providing additional nutritional information
  and metrics for food products on supported e-commerce platforms.

  For the latest features and updates, visit: https://github.com/Mohamed3on/NutriData

  ## Supported Platforms

  - **REWE.de** - Complete functionality on product and search pages


  ## Features

  ### Product Page
  - **Key nutritional metrics:**
    - Protein per euro/pound (g/€ or g/£)
    - Protein per 100 calories (g)
    - Protein to carb ratio
    - NutriScore - A custom composite metric combining protein density and value
  - Displays detailed nutritional information in an easy-to-read format
  - Color-coded metrics for quick assessment (red to green scale)

  ### Search Results Page (REWE only)
  - Adds nutritional metrics to each product card
  - **Custom sorting options based on nutritional metrics:**
    - NutriScore (High to Low)
    - Protein per euro/pound (High to Low)
    - Protein per 100 calories (High to Low)
    - Protein to carb ratio (High to Low)
    - Protein, Carbs, Fat (High to Low)
    - Sugar, Calories (Low to High)
  - Dynamically updates metrics for newly loaded products

  ## What is NutriScore?
  In this extension, NutriScore is a custom metric that combines protein per 100 calories with
  protein per currency value, weighted and adjusted for fiber content. Higher scores indicate
  products with better protein density and value. This is NOT the official Nutri-Score (A-E) rating
   system used in some countries.

  ## Note
  The Chrome Web Store version may lag behind due to review processes. For the latest features and
  bug fixes, please visit the GitHub repository.

ーーーーーーーー

＋拡張機能をインストールするとアマゾン販売ページにトラッキング登録画面が表示されます。

Displays the manufacturing location when looking at an inventory Tesla.

Features
URL-Based Analysis: The extension scans the URL to pinpoint key identifiers that may indicate the vehicle's country of manufacture.

Real-Time Feedback: Upon detecting a qualifying URL, the extension will dynamically append the estimated manufacturing origin to the vehicle's title, offering you immediate insight.

Ease of Use: Simply install the extension and browse Tesla's inventory as usual. The extension operates seamlessly in the background.

How to Use
1. Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store.
2. Navigate to Tesla's inventory page.
3. Click "View Details"
4. Observe the location of manufacture prediction that will appear in to the title of the vehicle you are currently viewing.

Disclaimer
By using this extension, you agree to the following disclaimer:

The information provided by this extension is intended solely as an additional reference and should not be used as the sole source for making decisions. While we strive to keep the information up to date and accurate, we make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability, or availability of the information provided.

In no event will the developers or distributors of this extension be liable for any loss or damage including without limitation, indirect or consequential loss or damage, or any loss or damage whatsoever arising from loss of data or profits arising out of, or in connection with, the use of this extension.

Use this extension at your own risk and discretion. We do not guarantee that the extension will function as advertised and reserve the right to update or remove it at any time.
This Chrome extension is specifically designed for the website https://animension.to/. It enhances the experience of managing and…

This Chrome extension is specifically designed for the website https://animension.to/. It enhances the experience of managing and tracking anime series directly from your browser. This tool allows users to manage their favorite anime series, track new episodes, and reorder their anime list through intuitive drag-and-drop functionality.


## Updates
-update on page load rather than using a service worker. 
-New episodes will show up at the top of the list.

## Features

- **Add Anime to Watchlist:** Users can add anime to their watchlist directly from the anime web pages on https://animension.to/.
- **Track Watched Episodes:** The extension tracks the episodes you've watched and notifies you when new episodes are available.
- **Drag and Drop:** Reorder your anime list easily using drag-and-drop functionality.
- **Local Storage Integration:** All data is stored locally in the browser, ensuring quick access and personal data control.

Adds a button to YouTube videos to generate a summary using Perplexity.

This Chrome extension enhances your YouTube experience by providing a convenient way to summarize videos using a customizable prompt with Perplexity.

Features
- In-Page Summarize Button: A "Summarize" button is automatically added to the YouTube video page, next to the like and dislike buttons.
- Customizable Prompt: Click the extension icon in your browser's toolbar to open a popup where you can edit and save your custom summarization prompt. The placeholder {videoUrl} will be automatically replaced with the video's URL.
PureTube is a browser extension that removes all distractions from YouTube, making it easier to focus on the content you love.
ハイライトしたテキストを、登録した最大5つのカスタムGemsページで開いてペーストします。

本拡張機能について:
「Gemで検索 (マルチURL対応)」は、ウェブページ上のテキストを選択し、事前に登録したお好みのGem（最大5つまで）へ瞬時に送信し、新しいタブで開いて自動的にペースト（または検索）することができるChrome拡張機能です。


主な機能と利点:
最大5つのカスタムURL登録: オプションページから、よく使うウェブサービスのURLを最大5つまでニックネーム付きで登録できます。これにより、用途に応じた複数の宛先を簡単に管理し、使い分けることが可能です。

スピーディーな情報アクセス: テキストを選択して右クリックし、コンテキストメニューから目的の登録済みURLを選ぶだけで、新しいタブが開き、選択したテキストが自動的に入力フィールドにペーストされます（対象ウェブサイトの構造に依存します）。コピー＆ペーストの繰り返し作業から解放されます。

作業効率の向上: 情報検索、文章作成、翻訳、プログラミングなど、様々なシーンでの情報収集や活用がスムーズになり、思考の流れを妨げません。

簡単な設定: 拡張機能のアイコンをクリックするだけで、直感的に操作できるオプションページにアクセスし、URLの追加や編集が簡単に行えます。

使い方:

ツールバーの拡張機能アイコンをクリックしてオプションページを開きます。

「ニックネーム」と「URL」のペアを最大5つまで入力し、「保存」ボタンをクリックします。（例: ニックネーム「Geminiチャット」、URL「https://gemini.google.com/app」）

ウェブページ上で任意のテキストを選択します。
選択したテキストの上で右クリックします。
コンテキストメニューに表示された「選択テキストをカスタムGemsで検索...」の中から、先ほど登録したニックネームを選択します。

新しいタブで指定したURLが開き、選択したテキストが自動的にペースト（または検索ボックスに投入）されます。


こんな方におすすめ:
・Geminiやその他のAIチャットを日常的に活用している方
・複数の検索エンジンや専門サイトを使い分けて情報を収集する方
・特定の社内ツールやウェブアプリケーションに頻繁にテキストを入力する方
・コピー＆ペーストの作業を少しでも減らして時間を有効活用したい方
Automatically selects radio buttons and submits the form.
